presets.name: Web Designer
presets.description: AI-powered web designer for your storefront. Creates and edits HTML/CSS pages with live preview.

presets.name: Competitor Researcher
presets.description: Analyzes competitors, monitors pricing, audits SEO, and generates market intelligence reports.

presets.name: Store Manager
presets.description: Full-access store assistant. Manages products, orders, customers, promos, and all store operations.

presets.name: Content Writer
presets.description: Creates blog posts, product descriptions, and marketing copy with SEO optimization.

presets.name: Data Analyst
presets.description: Analyzes sales data, generates revenue reports, identifies trends, and creates dashboards.
